This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] EdDSA Ed25519 verification with altered signature during call
  assert_true: Signature verified expected true got false
[FAIL] EdDSA Ed25519 verification with transferred signature during call
  assert_false: Signature is NOT verified expected false got true
[FAIL] EdDSA Ed25519 with altered data during call
  assert_true: Signature verified expected true got false
[FAIL] EdDSA Ed25519 with transferred data during call
  assert_false: Signature is NOT verified expected false got true
Harness: the test ran to completion.
